// Close mobile menu when a link is clicked
showToast(`🔥 You selected the ${plan} plan! Redirecting...`, true);
showToast('❌ Please fill in all fields.', false);
showToast('❌ Please enter a valid email address.', false);
// Simulate sending (would normally be an API call)
showToast(`✅ Thanks, ${name}! We'll get back to you soon.`, true);
// Smooth scroll for anchor links (additional safety)
console.log('💪 IRON CORE Gym — ready to crush it!');
